subject: GRB & BeppoSAX: ground operations restored back to 24 hrs a day
body:
The final step of a series of actions aimed to restore the
ground operations of BeppoSAX to its previous level, i.e. 24 hrs a day
coverage, has been recently achieved.

As of Dec. 17, BeppoSAX ground operations come back to 24 hrs a day, 7
days a week (but for the X-mas night, Italian time).



Luigi Piro

BeppoSAX Mission Scientist
